name: Anhui Huangshan Capsule Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Huangshan Capsule Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells vacant hard capsules. It offers entersoluble vacant gelatin capsules, vegetable entersoluble capsules, vacant gelatin capsules, colon soluble vacant gelatin capsules, vegetable capsules, and pulluan capsules. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Jingde, China.
